targets.query:
from(bucket: "digital_twin")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cold_chain")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "temperature")
  |> group(columns: ["crop_type"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 15m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "digital_twin")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cold_chain")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "quality_index")
  |> group(columns: ["crop_type"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 15m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "digital_twin")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cold_chain")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "rsl_percent")
  |> group(columns: ["crop_type"])
  |> mean()

from(bucket: "digital_twin")
  |> range(start: -30d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cold_chain" and r.is_spoiled == "true")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "temperature")
  |> group(columns: ["crop_type"])
  |> count()

panels.title: High Mold Risk Events (score > 0.7, last 7 d)

targets.query:
from(bucket: "digital_twin")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cold_chain")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "mold_risk_score")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value > 0.7)
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 50)

from(bucket: "digital_twin")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cold_chain")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "energy_consumed_kwh")
  |> group(columns: ["crop_type"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Decay Sub-Models — FLU Total per Crop

targets.query:
from(bucket: "digital_twin")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cold_chain")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "flu_total")
  |> group(columns: ["crop_type"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 15m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
